description: These laid back leather high-top boots from timberland are a great combination of style and features. The two-tone leather lends it a natural finish, while the retro-esque work boot design makes it perfect urban wear. Team this pair with jeans and shirts.UpperTwo-tone leather upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleBuilt up ankle for better comfort and styleRounded toe for more toe spaceLace-up system for a snug FitLeather inner lining for ultimate breathabilityCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortHaul loop at the collarMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with textured pattern and upraised heelshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
